summary: Iteration 97 - Shop Management Admin Component UI Testing Complete. All 13 features verified successfully. The ShopManagement component at /admin/shop is fully functional with Dashboard, Products, Orders, and Settings tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopManagement.js correctly implements all 4 tabs (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Settings)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented: shop-management, tab-dashboard, tab-products, tab-orders, tab-settings, add-product-btn, product-search, save-product-btn, refresh-shop
AdminDashboard.js correctly shows Shop Management card with ShoppingCart icon linking to /admin/shop
App.js has correct lazy import and route for ShopManagement at /admin/shop
Product form modal has all required fields: Name, Price, Category, Stock, Unit, Description, Warranty, Specifications, Active/Featured toggles
Order detail view shows customer info, items, total, and status update buttons (Pending, Confirmed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled)
Settings tab shows Delivery Settings, Payment Gateway (Cashfree), and Quick Actions
seed_data_creation: None - Using existing shop data (9 products, 61 orders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop Management admin component fully tested. Key verification points: (1) Admin Dashboard shows Shop Management card with ShoppingCart icon, (2) /admin/shop loads with Dashboard tab showing stats (Products: 9, Orders: 61, Revenue: 18,770, Avg Order: 3,461), (3) Recent Orders table visible, (4) Products tab has search bar, category filter, Add Product button, (5) Add Product modal has all fields, (6) Orders tab has filter buttons and order detail view with status updates, (7) Settings tab shows Delivery Settings, Payment Gateway (Cashfree), Quick Actions, (8) View Shop link opens /shop in new tab, (9) Back arrow navigates to /admin/dashboard, (10) Public /shop page works with 9 products.

features_verified.1. Admin Dashboard shows Shop Management: VERIFIED - Card visible with ShoppingCart icon, 'Products, orders & payments' description, links to /admin/shop
features_verified.2. Shop Management page loads at /admin/: VERIFIED - Page loads with Dashboard tab active
features_verified.3. Dashboard tab shows stats: VERIFIED - Products (9), Orders (61), Revenue (18,770), Avg Order (3,461)
features_verified.4. Dashboard tab shows Recent Orders tab: VERIFIED - Table with Order, Customer, Amount, Status, Payment, Date columns
features_verified.5. Products tab shows products: VERIFIED - 9 products displayed with name, category, price, stock, Edit/Delete buttons
features_verified.7. Products tab has category filter: VERIFIED - Dropdown with 7 options (All Categories + 6 categories)
features_verified.9. Product form modal has all fields: VERIFIED - Name, Price, Category, Stock, Unit, Description, Warranty, Specifications, Active/Featured toggles
features_verified.10. Orders tab shows orders with filters: VERIFIED - Filter buttons: All, Pending, Confirmed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled
features_verified.11. Order detail view with status update: VERIFIED - Shows customer info, items, total, status update buttons
features_verified.12. Settings tab shows all sections: VERIFIED - Delivery Settings, Payment Gateway (Cashfree), Quick Actions
features_verified.13. View Shop link opens /shop: VERIFIED - Link has target='_blank' and href='/shop'
features_verified.15. Public shop page /shop works: VERIFIED - 9 products displayed with Add to Cart buttons
